---
title: ""
page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: home-news
    contents: news/posts
    sort: "date desc"
    template: assets/home-listing-grid.ejs.md
    fields: [title, date, description, categories, path]
    max-items: 6

  - id: home-publications
    contents: publications/*/index.qmd
    sort:
      - "pub-status asc"
      - "date desc"
    template: assets/home-listing-scroll.ejs.md
    fields: [title, pub-year, pub-authors, venue, pub-status, pub-type, pdf, path]
    max-items: 6
---

::: {.hero-header}
::: {.hero-logo}
![](images/lablogo.png){alt="CALM Lab logo"}
:::

::: {.hero-text}
::: {.hero-title}
CALM LAB
:::

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Control of Attention in Life and Mind
:::
:::
:::

::: {.hero-intro}
The CALM Lab studies attention control across contexts of life and mind, combining cognitive science, neuroscience, and contemplative approaches to understand how attention shapes thought, performance, and well-being.
:::

::: {.grid-3 .section-shell}
::: {.card .card-interactive .card-body .is-blue}
<a href="/team/" class="quick-card-link">
  <div class="icon-badge icon-badge-sm">
    <i class="bi bi-people"></i>
  </div>

  ### Team

  Meet the researchers and students working in the CALM Lab.

  <span class="link-cta">View Team →</span>
</a>
:::

::: {.card .card-interactive .card-body .is-red}
<a href="/projects/" class="quick-card-link">
  <div class="icon-badge icon-badge-sm">
    <i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i>
  </div>

  ### Projects

  Explore our research on attention control, brain networks, and mindfulness.

  <span class="link-cta">View Projects →</span>
</a>
:::

::: {.card .card-interactive .card-body .is-green}
<a href="/contact/" class="quick-card-link">
  <div class="icon-badge icon-badge-sm">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
  </div>

  ### Connect

  Interested in collaborating, joining the lab, or learning more about our work?

  <span class="link-cta">Get in Touch →</span>
</a>
:::
:::

---

## Latest News

::: {#home-news}
:::

---

## Latest Publications

::: {#home-publications}
:::

::: {.listing-more}
<a href="/publications/" class="link-cta">View All Publications →</a>
:::
